response.justification: The candidate has strong general software engineering experience and a broad skill set, but lacks direct experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise tooling, IDE internals, or JVM-specific frameworks (e.g., Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate). Their background is heavy in web/mobile development, scripting languages, and system-level programming (C/C++, D), with minimal evidence of JVM expertise or IDE development.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and architectural skills across diverse tech stacks
Proven ability to work on complex systems and large-scale codebases
Experience with developer tooling (MCP, CI/CD, testing frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with Java/Kotlin enterprise frameworks or JVM tooling
Minimal exposure to IDE internals or language server protocols
Limited evidence of working with Spring, Hibernate, or enterprise build tools (Gradle/Maven)
